command.text: &CreateTicket; declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'this._authorize = ' + rtrim(@@admin) + ';this._key = ''' + @ticket + ''';load$GridGNApprovalRoles(this);' if @@admin <> 1 select @message = @message + 'this._denyNew = true;this._denyEdit = true;this._denyDelete = true;' select @message as message return
